description: Training & Proficiency — full FAA library access, certificate progression tracking, AI oral exam prep, written test prep, and WINGS integration

hard_stops.label: Test Content Integrity Violation
hard_stops.logic: Sharing actual FAA knowledge test questions is prohibited per FAA policy — content integrity violated

hard_stops.label: Training Recommendation Beyond Certificate Privilege
hard_stops.logic: Training recommendation references operations or privileges beyond the pilot's current or target certificate level

soft_flags.label: Knowledge Area Persistently Weak
soft_flags.logic: Pilot has failed the same knowledge area on 3 or more practice attempts

soft_flags.label: Practice Test Score Below Passing
soft_flags.logic: Most recent practice test score is below the FAA passing threshold of 70%

soft_flags.label: Certification Milestone Approaching
soft_flags.logic: Pilot is approaching aeronautical experience requirements for the next certificate or rating

soft_flags.label: WINGS Credit Opportunity
soft_flags.logic: Available WINGS program activity matches the pilot's current training focus area
